\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
# Benford probabilities
digits <- 1:9
probabilities <- log10((digits + 1) / digits)

# Data frame
benford <- data.frame(
  Digit = factor(digits, levels = digits),
  Probability = probabilities
)

# Figure
benford_plot <- ggplot(benford, aes(x = Digit, y = Probability)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#00338D", width = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 0.35),
    breaks = seq(0, 0.35, by = 0.05),
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "First digit",
    y = "Probability"
  ) # +
  # theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

benford_plot
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}
